# KEYFO Restaurant & Cafe

## Canonical facts
- Business name: KEYFO Restaurant & Cafe
- Address: Broersveld 103, 3111 LE Schiedam, Netherlands
- Phone / WhatsApp: +31 6 41014926
- Opening hours: Daily 12:00-22:00 (Monday through Sunday)
- Cuisine: Turkish, Grill
- Halal: Halal options available
- Services: pickup by WhatsApp or phone, delivery via Thuisbezorgd, dine-in available
- Online ordering on this site: not available
- Payment on this site: not available
- HTML menu: https://keyfo.nl/#menu
- JSON menu: https://keyfo.nl/menu.json
- Business data JSON: https://keyfo.nl/business.json

Turkse grill en döner in Schiedam.
Türk grill ve döner, Schiedam.

## Address
Broersveld 103, 3111 LE Schiedam, Netherlands

## Hours
Daily 12:00-22:00 (Monday through Sunday)

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +31 6 41014926
- Email: keyfo-grill@hotmail.com

## Website
- Dutch (primary): https://keyfo.nl/
- Turkish: https://keyfo.nl/tr/

## Cuisine
Turkish, Grill

## Halal
Halal options available (Halal opties / Helal seçenekler).

## Services
- Pickup: WhatsApp or phone
- Delivery: external via Thuisbezorgd at https://www.thuisbezorgd.nl/da/menu/keyfo
- Dine-in: yes
- Reservations: not accepted via this site
- Online ordering on this site: not available
- Payment on this site: not available

## Menu
- Crawlable HTML: https://keyfo.nl/#menu
- JSON: https://keyfo.nl/menu.json

## Business data (machine-readable)
JSON: https://keyfo.nl/business.json

## Social
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/keyfokipgrill_/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/hanife.isleyen.1/photos
- Thuisbezorgd: https://www.thuisbezorgd.nl/da/menu/keyfo

## Notes
- Menu prices and availability may change.
- Thuisbezorgd prices and conditions may differ from in-house pickup.
- For allergens, ask before ordering.
